cases.case_ref: Pending litigation disclosed in IPO prospectus (specifics not independently verified)
cases.parties: Karnika Industries Limited and one group company (parties/counterparties not disclosed in sources reviewed)
cases.note: The company's Sep 2023 SME IPO prospectus (DRHP) has a chapter titled 'Outstanding Litigations and Material Developments' (p.186 per adviser summaries) confirming the Company and a Group Company have ongoing legal proceedings, and that unfavorable outcomes could affect the business/financials. Attempts to fetch the primary prospectus document for case-level detail (parties, forum, amount, nature) were unsuccessful in this session -- treat this as a confirmed but unquantified disclosure, not a verified specific case, until the DRHP or a more recent annual report's litigation note is reviewed directly.
cases.source: Karnika Industries Limited SME Prospectus, filed with SEBI 25 Sep 2023 (via adviser/prospectus-summary sites; primary PDF not retrievable in this session)
